form.label: Sign off History
form.description: Historical sign-off records for Compliance Review.

search.query: index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" | spath input=_raw path=department output=department | stats count by department | fields department
index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" | stats count by hostname | fields hostname
index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" | stats count by reviewed_by | fields reviewed_by

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff"
| where (hostname="$filter_host$" OR "$filter_host$"="*") | where (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | where (reviewed_by="$filter_reviewer$" OR "$filter_reviewer$"="*")
| eval "Signed Off At" = strftime(_time,"%d %b %Y %H:%M:%S")
| table "Signed Off At" hostname department reviewed_by remarks
| rename hostname as "Host" department as "Department" reviewed_by as "Reviewed By" remarks as "Remarks"
| sort -"Signed Off At"
